articles.title: UK scientists developing Ebola vaccine that could be ready for trials in months
articles.description: The rare species of Ebola involved - known as Bundibugyo - kills around a third of those infected and has no proven vaccine yet.

articles.title: Foden, Palmer, Alexander-Arnold to miss World Cup
articles.description: Phil Foden, Cole Palmer and Trent Alexander-Arnold have not been included in Thomas Tuchel's 26-man England squad for this summer's World Cup.

articles.title: Parents of Southport survivors say anonymity has erased their girls from the story
articles.description: The BBC has spoken to parents of some of the children who survived the knife attack, who believe they have been given insufficient support because of the anonymity order.

articles.title: Andrew investigation could look into sexual misconduct allegations
articles.description: The former prince was arrested in February on suspicion of misconduct in public office.
